scripts.audit: node scripts/with-release-lock.js "npm run build:release && node scripts/completion-audit.js && node scripts/package-hygiene.js"
scripts.doctor: node scripts/with-release-lock.js "npm run build:release && node scripts/doctor.js"
scripts.hygiene: node scripts/with-release-lock.js "npm run build:release && node scripts/package-hygiene.js"
scripts.qa:report: node scripts/with-release-lock.js "npm run build:release && node scripts/completion-audit.js && node scripts/package-hygiene.js && node scripts/write-qa-report.js"
scripts.verify:devtools-engine: npm run build:release && /Applications/wechatwebdevtools.app/Contents/MacOS/cli engine build ../wechat-mini-arcade-release --lang zh
scripts.verify:release: node scripts/with-release-lock.js "npm run build:release && node test/release.test.js && node test/release-devtools.test.js"
scripts.test: node -c game.js && node -c js/logic.js && node -c scripts/release-lock.js && node -c scripts/with-release-lock.js && node -c scripts/build-release.js && node -c scripts/doctor.js && node -c scripts/completion-audit.js && node -c scripts/package-hygiene.js && node -c scripts/write-qa-report.js && node -c test/release-devtools.test.js && node -c test/text-fit.test.js && node -c test/input-safety.test.js && node -c test/replay.test.js && node -c test/render-contract.test.js && node -c test/preview-runtime.test.js && node -c test/canvas-compat.test.js && zsh -n open-in-wechat-devtools.command && node scripts/build-release.js && node test/project.test.js && node test/logic.test.js && node test/smoke.test.js && node test/interaction.test.js && node test/input-safety.test.js && node test/canvas-compat.test.js && node test/layout.test.js && node test/text-fit.test.js && node test/lifecycle.test.js && node test/replay.test.js && node test/render-contract.test.js && node test/preview.test.js && node test/preview-runtime.test.js && node test/stress.test.js && node test/release.test.js && node test/release-devtools.test.js && node scripts/doctor.js && node scripts/completion-audit.js && node scripts/package-hygiene.js
